name: Taffy Apple Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 package refrigerated peanut butter cookie dough, (20 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Remove half of the cookie dough and set aside for another use.
3. Add flour to the remaining dough and knead with hands until combined.
4. Press the dough into a 14-inch circle on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until lightly browned. Let cool for 10 minutes, then loosen from the pan. Cool completely.
6. In a bowl, blend cream cheese, light brown sugar, and vanilla until smooth.
7. Spread the mixture evenly over the cooled cookie base.
8. Peel, core, and slice the apples. Dip each slice in lemon-lime soda to prevent browning.
9. Arrange the apple slices on top of the cream cheese mixture.
10. Sprinkle cinnamon lightly over the apples.
11. Heat the caramel topping slightly until it is more pliable.
12. Drizzle the caramel over the apple slices.
13. Sprinkle chopped peanuts evenly over the pizza.
14. Cut into pieces and serve.
